DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64.purpose: Ensures better server performance and stability for players on Windows.

FFlagFoundationInternalTextInputAutoSize.mechanism: Automatically adjusts text input fields based on content size.
FFlagFoundationInternalTextInputAutoSize.purpose: Improves user experience by making text inputs fit the text without manual adjustments.

FFlagProfileInsightsSkipCache_Staged.mechanism: Bypasses cached data for profile insights to fetch real-time information.
FFlagProfileInsightsSkipCache_Staged.purpose: Provides players with the most up-to-date information on profiles.

DFIntNonLocalChildWithMRDRemovedUEThrott.mechanism: Disables a specific throttle on non-local child objects in the game engine.
DFIntNonLocalChildWithMRDRemovedUEThrott.purpose: Improves performance and responsiveness for players by allowing smoother interactions with certain game elements.
